name: 假设检验与置信区间
subject: math
domain_name: Further Prob & Stats / Further Probability & Statistics
curriculum_points: understand the concept of a confidence interval for a population mean or proportion, and be able to calculate and interpret such intervals
understand the concept of a hypothesis test for a population mean or proportion, and be able to carry out such tests and interpret the results
understand the difference between one-tailed and two-tailed tests
understand the meaning of significance level and p-value
use the normal distribution or t-distribution as appropriate in hypothesis tests and confidence intervals
